title: Translating Regular Expressions to Python Code
scenario: Translate regular expressions to equivalent Python code for string processing. The input may include complex regular expressions, and the output should demonstrate an understanding of Python's re module and regular expression syntax.
constraints: Must use the Python re module
Must correctly handle capture groups and backreferences

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output correctly maps regular expressions to Python code.
Check if the output uses the Python re module.
Check if the output correctly handles capture groups and backreferences.
